title: The Second Breviate.

verses.book: A Treatise Concerning Man’s Perfection in Righteousness.
A Treatise Concerning Man’s Perfection in Righteousness.
verses.text: “We must next ask,” he says, “whether sin comes from will, or from necessity?

verses.book: A Treatise Concerning Man’s Perfection in Righteousness.
verses.text: If from necessity, it is not sin; if from will, it can be avoided.”

verses.book: A Treatise Concerning Man’s Perfection in Righteousness.
verses.text: We answer as before; and in order that we may be healed, we pray to Him to whom it is said in the psalm: “Lead Thou me out of my necessities.”
